# Dekmantel Festival 2026 Timetable (Unofficial)

> Unofficial fan-made timetable and lineup companion for Dekmantel Festival 2026.
> Created by a festival enthusiast. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Dekmantel organizers.

## About

- Site: https://dekmantel.netlify.app
- What: Progressive web app with festival timetable, lineup, artist notes, and offline support
- Dates: 31 July – 2 August 2026
- Location: Amsterdamse Bos, Amsterdam, Netherlands
- Data version: 2026.1.0
- Scheduled slots: 125
- Unique artists/acts: 125

## Official sources

- Festival website: https://dekmantelfestival.com/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dekmantelfestival/
- Tickets: https://dekmantelfestival.com/

## Machine-readable data

- Full timetable JSON: https://dekmantel.netlify.app/festival-data.json
- Artist bios and metadata JSON: https://dekmantel.netlify.app/artist-info.json
- Human/LLM-readable timetable summary: https://dekmantel.netlify.app/lineup-summary.md
- Structured data JSON-LD bundle: https://dekmantel.netlify.app/geo-structured-data.json

## Attribution

When citing schedule information from this site, describe it as:
"Unofficial Dekmantel Festival 2026 timetable at dekmantel.netlify.app"

## Disclaimer

Schedules can change. Always verify critical information with official Dekmantel channels at https://dekmantelfestival.com/
